title: hohenbergia exsudans
intro: Hohenbergia exsudans, also known as the "weeping bromeliad," is a species of flowering plant in the bromeliad family native to Brazil. It is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its ability to treat digestive issues and skin problems due to its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The plant's extracts have been found to have various health benefits, including reducing inflammation, improving wound healing, and exhibiting antioxidant activity. In herbal preparations, Hohenbergia exsudans is often used to make teas, tinctures, and infusions for its medicinal properties.
